summaries.software_engineer: Full-stack software engineer with production experience building AI-integrated platforms. Founded technical consultancy delivering Python-based automation systems, MCP servers, and REST APIs serving multiple clients. Background in biomedical engineering brings systematic approach to complex system design and rigorous testing practices.
summaries.ai_ml_engineer: AI/ML engineer specializing in LLM integration and intelligent automation systems. Built production MCP servers connecting AI agents to real-world services, with experience in ML pipelines, time-series analysis, and prompt engineering. Combines software engineering rigor with deep understanding of AI agent architectures.
summaries.technical_lead: Technical founder with experience architecting multi-tier platforms and leading AI-augmented development workflows. Designed DOE (Directive-Orchestration-Execution) architecture pattern managing 10+ interconnected projects. Strong background in system design, API architecture, and cross-functional delivery.
summaries.product_manager: Technical product manager with hands-on engineering experience and business acumen. Founded consultancy achieving 80%+ efficiency gains for clients through AI-powered automation. Skilled at translating technical capabilities into business outcomes, with experience in roadmap planning, metrics definition, and stakeholder communication.
